fields.description: How the gateway runs for inbound messages from this platform. 'sync' runs inline with the insert (use for CLI). 'async' enqueues a Frappe RQ job (use for webhooks like Telegram, Slack).
fields.label: Dispatch Mode

fields.description: Optional fallback Agent Profile when an adapter doesn't explicitly resolve one for an inbound message.
fields.label: Default Agent Profile

fields.description: Per-platform batching window (Slice 4: stub only; the batching queue/timer lands when the first bursty surface ships). 0 = flush immediately (CLI). 500 recommended for Telegram/Slack.
fields.label: Batch Idle (ms)
